code: import React,{useState}from"react";import api from"../services/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function RuleEditor(){const[stepId,setStepId]=useState("");const[condition,setCondition]=useState("");const[nextStep,setNextStep]=useState("");const[priority,setPriority]=useState(1);const addRule=async()=>{try{await api.post(`/steps/${stepId}/rules`,{condition,next_step_id:nextStep,priority});alert("Rule added");}catch(err){console.error(err);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:"20px"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Create Rule"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Step ID",value:stepId,onChange:e=>setStepId(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Condition",value:condition,onChange:e=>setCondition(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Next Step ID",value:nextStep,onChange:e=>setNextStep(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",placeholder:"Priority",value:priority,onChange:e=>setPriority(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:addRule,children:"Add Rule"})]});}export default RuleEditor;
